goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:00' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should depart from 'leicester' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get attraction type
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:00 and should leave on wednesday
The train should depart from leicester and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get price and travel time
